rows.label: qev065508_MSG0001
rows.name:
Right now, I am looking after the
Definians who have been scattered.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065508_MSG0002
rows.name:
However... troubles like Lyvia's
are outside my field of expertise.
I am glad you came.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065508_MSG0003
rows.name:
Is it possible for us Definians
to hold emotions such as romance,
just like Earthlings do?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065508_MSG0004
rows.name:
Even if we can mimic it, is it
not impossible for us to feel
it in a fundamental sense?[ST:wait ]
